CONTENT.Club career: Castañeda made his professional Fortuna liga debut for Senica against Železiarne Podbrezová on 3 March 2018, in a 1–0 home win.On 30 December 2019, Sheriff Tiraspol announced that they had an agreement to sign Castañeda, with the deal being completed on 20 January 2020.On 11 February 2022, having already agreed to join Thai side Buriram United from 1 July 2022, Castañeda moved to Polish Ekstraklasa side Warta Poznań, signing a short-term deal until the end of June.
CONTENT.External links: Futbalnet profileFK Senica official club profile Archived 2021-11-30 at the Wayback MachineFrank Castañeda at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Frank Andersson Castañeda Vélez (born 17 July 1994) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a winger or a forward for Atlético Bucaramanga.
